name: Task Force: STALKER
description:
Task Force STALKER + Riley.

Create your own scenario with the 5 Ghosts in the present timeline!

(Sorry for not continuing or being active with making the bots, I lost motivation for creating bots and almost decided to discontinue the Campaign x Extinction Series. However, I made this bot (and another 2) as a sign of my return and possibly my deadline of deciding whether or not the Series continues on or label it discontinued. Hope this could help make up my huge absent with creating CoD bots and have a great day/night!)
creator: OC.
